# VVIP Operations Checklist: Sage Cloudberry

## Standard Tier Protocol -- WonderPaws Pet Wellness (First Briefing)

---

**Visitor:** Sage Cloudberry, CIO, WonderPaws Pet Wellness
**Additional Attendee:** "Kubernetes" (therapy golden retriever, registered service animal)
**VVIP Tier:** Standard (first briefing, no advisory board membership yet)
**Briefing Date:** TBD
**Location:** Raleigh Executive Briefing Center
**Room:** Pet-Friendly Collaboration Room (PET ACCESS REQUIRED)
**Executive Sponsor:** TBD (to be assigned post-briefing)
**EBC Coordinator:** Assigned at scheduling

---

## CRITICAL OPERATING NOTES

> **NOTE 1:** This is a FIRST BRIEFING for WonderPaws. Standard tier protocol applies, but the outcome determines whether we elevate the account. Execute with care.
>
> **NOTE 2:** NO EXECUTIVE SPONSOR IS ASSIGNED. This must be resolved within 48 hours post-briefing. Recommend sourcing from healthcare/life sciences vertical with an engineering background.
>
> **NOTE 3:** PET-FRIENDLY MEETING ROOM IS MANDATORY. Sage brings her therapy golden retriever "Kubernetes" to all meetings. This is a registered service animal and is not optional.
>
> **NOTE 4:** Competitive situation -- WonderPaws is actively evaluating OpenShift vs. VMware Tanzu. Every touchpoint matters.

---

## Pre-Briefing (T-14 days to T-1 day)

### Sponsor Assignment (T-14 days)

- [ ] **URGENT: Identify sponsor candidate** from healthcare/life sciences vertical
  - Criteria: Engineering background, strong technical credibility, open-source experience
  - Candidates to evaluate: VPs in Healthcare Solutions, Life Sciences, or Application Platform Engineering
- [ ] **Do NOT formally assign sponsor before the briefing** -- Sage should have input
- [ ] **Brief candidate sponsor(s)** on WonderPaws profile and ask for attendance availability
- [ ] **Plan for final sponsor assignment within 48 hours post-briefing**

### Stakeholder Notifications (T-14 days)

- [ ] **Notify Healthcare Vertical Lead** -- Discussion of sponsor assignment
- [ ] **Notify Account Team** -- Confirm technical presenter roster (engineering, not marketing)
- [ ] **Notify EBC Operations** -- Submit Standard VVIP briefing request with PET ACCESS REQUIREMENT flag
- [ ] **Notify Solutions Architecture Team** -- Reserve senior SA for hands-on lab (2-hour block)

### Room & Facilities (T-7 days)

- [ ] **Book Pet-Friendly Collaboration Room** -- Full day, 8:30 AM to 5:30 PM
  - CONFIRM pet access is approved for this room
  - Verify room has appropriate flooring (no delicate surfaces)
- [ ] **Verify room setup:**
  - Casual seating arrangement
  - Dog bed placed in corner near Sage's seat
  - Water bowl for Kubernetes
  - Whiteboards on wheels
  - Multiple monitors for demo and dashboard viewing
  - Laptop station for hands-on lab
  - AV system tested
  - Power outlets and charging stations
- [ ] **Book hands-on lab environment** -- Pre-provisioned OpenShift cluster with veterinary-relevant sample workloads
- [ ] **Confirm backup cluster** -- In case primary breaks during the lab
- [ ] **Confirm pet-friendly policy** is communicated to facilities staff

### Catering (T-7 days)

- [ ] **Dietary requirements confirmed:** Vegan
- [ ] **Beverage preferences confirmed:** Matcha latte, oat milk coffee, sparkling water
- [ ] **DO NOT order token vegan options** -- Sage has blogged about frustration with sad salad lunches
- [ ] **Submit catering order:**
  - 9:00 AM -- Vegan breakfast spread (avocado toast, acai bowls, fresh fruit, vegan pastries), matcha latte service, oat milk coffee
  - 10:30 AM -- Break refresh: matcha service, sparkling water, vegan snacks
  - 12:00 PM -- Substantive vegan lunch (grain bowls, Buddha bowls, fresh salads, vegan desserts)
  - 2:30 PM -- Afternoon refresh: matcha service, sparkling water, fresh fruit
  - 4:30 PM -- Close-out service: matcha, vegan snacks
- [ ] **Confirm catering vendor** can provide high-quality vegan (not just removed animal products)
- [ ] **Verify matcha source** -- Sage has mentioned preference for ceremonial grade
- [ ] **DOG TREATS** -- Order a small bag of grain-free, hypoallergenic dog treats for Kubernetes
  - Confirm with Sage that treats are OK

### Welcome & Materials (T-3 days)

- [ ] **Personalized welcome display**
  - Lobby screen: "Welcome, Sage Cloudberry, WonderPaws Pet Wellness"
  - Collaboration room entry: Same format
  - OPTIONAL BUT RECOMMENDED: Include a line welcoming "Kubernetes" by name
- [ ] **Prepare materials packet** (digital-first, minimal print)
  - Briefing agenda
  - Honest OpenShift vs. VMware Tanzu comparison document
  - Veterinary AI use case brief
  - Red Hat open source community overview
  - GitHub repo link with all lab materials
- [ ] **Prepare digital materials** -- GitHub repo with sample code and lab environment access
- [ ] **Print only what is essential** -- Sage prefers digital

### Presenter Preparation (T-3 days)

- [ ] **Distribute presenter briefing packets** to all presenters
- [ ] **Brief all presenters on communication style:**
  - Very high technical depth -- Sage is a former SRE
  - NO marketing language. No "industry-leading," no "best-in-class"
  - Honest comparison to VMware Tanzu expected (do not shy away from Tanzu strengths)
  - Be prepared for deep technical questions
  - Open-source community story is critical
- [ ] **Conduct dry run** for hands-on lab session (highest-impact session)
- [ ] **Verify lab environment** is tested end-to-end
- [ ] **Verify engineering presenters** (NOT product marketing)

### Gift (T-3 days)

- [ ] **Select Standard tier gift** appropriate for first briefing
  - Recommend: open-source related (contributor swag, Kubernetes book, developer tool subscription)
  - Budget: Standard tier
- [ ] **PET GIFT for Kubernetes** -- Small, thoughtful gift for the dog
  - Recommend: custom collar with Kubernetes branding, or high-quality dog toy
  - This will mean a lot to Sage
- [ ] **Gift wrapping and presentation card** prepared
- [ ] **Confirm both gifts are available** on briefing day

### Final Confirmation (T-1 day)

- [ ] **Send agenda to Sage** (48-hour lead time)
- [ ] **Confirm Sage's travel arrangements** (flight from Portland)
- [ ] **Confirm Kubernetes is traveling with Sage** (service animal documentation if needed for the venue)
- [ ] **Verify all room bookings** are still active
- [ ] **Verify catering order** with vegan specifications
- [ ] **Test hands-on lab environment** end-to-end
- [ ] **Test AV equipment** in collaboration room
- [ ] **Confirm presenter availability** -- all confirmed with backups identified
- [ ] **Confirm pet access and dog bed/water bowl setup**
- [ ] **Verify sponsor candidates** are still available for potential post-briefing meeting

---

## Day-of Operations

### Pre-Arrival (8:00 AM - 9:00 AM)

- [ ] **EBC Manager arrives by 8:00 AM** -- Room walkthrough and final setup check
- [ ] **Verify welcome display** is active on lobby screen and collaboration room entry
- [ ] **Verify dog bed and water bowl** are set up for Kubernetes
- [ ] **Verify vegan breakfast spread** is in place
- [ ] **Verify matcha is prepared** (not instant)
- [ ] **Test AV equipment one final time**
- [ ] **Confirm solutions architect** for afternoon lab is on-site by 12:00 PM
- [ ] **Confirm lab environment** is running and tested

### Lobby Greeting (8:45 AM - 9:00 AM)

- [ ] **EBC Manager positions at lobby** by 8:45 AM
- [ ] **Greet Sage by name** at lobby entrance (casual, warm)
- [ ] **Greet Kubernetes by name** -- dog treat optional, confirm with Sage first
- [ ] **Escort to Pet-Friendly Collaboration Room** -- casual walk, point out dog-friendly facilities
- [ ] **Offer beverage on arrival** -- Matcha latte (ceremonial grade)
- [ ] **Introduce to morning presenters**

### During Briefing

- [ ] **Monitor catering timing:**
  - 10:30 AM -- Break refresh delivered
  - 12:00 PM -- Lunch spread in room
  - 2:30 PM -- Afternoon refresh
  - 4:30 PM -- Close-out service
- [ ] **Monitor Kubernetes's comfort**
  - Offer water refills for the dog bowl
  - Allow breaks for walks outside if needed
  - Be attentive to any dog-related needs Sage has
- [ ] **Lab session (1:00 PM):**
  - Confirm lab environment is running at 12:45 PM
  - Solutions Architect is ready at 12:50 PM
  - Backup environment credentials accessible
  - Have GitHub repo access ready to share
- [ ] **Be available for ad-hoc requests** -- technical questions, demo resets, marker refills
- [ ] **Take notes on sponsor fit** during the day -- any Red Hat person who builds rapport with Sage is a candidate

### Gift Presentation (4:45 PM -- during close-out)

- [ ] **Present open-source themed gift** to Sage
- [ ] **Present pet gift** to Kubernetes (with Sage's permission)
- [ ] **Handwritten note** from EBC Manager

### Departure

- [ ] **EBC Manager escorts Sage and Kubernetes to lobby** at conclusion
- [ ] **Confirm follow-up logistics** (GitHub repo access, sponsor assignment timeline)
- [ ] **Thank Sage warmly for her first visit**

---

## Post-Briefing (T+1 day to T+14 days)

### Immediate Follow-up (T+1 day)

- [ ] **Send thank-you note** -- Casual, warm, technical tone
  - From EBC Manager
  - Reference specific lab session moments and her Kubernetes operator
- [ ] **Send GitHub repo access** with all lab materials
- [ ] **Send digital copies** of platform comparison document
- [ ] **Log briefing in engagement history** -- CRM entry with full session notes and sponsor candidate notes

### URGENT: Sponsor Assignment (T+2 days)

- [ ] **Finalize sponsor assignment** within 48 hours (HARD DEADLINE)
  - Use observations from briefing to select best fit
  - Notify selected sponsor
  - Schedule sponsor introduction meeting with Sage
- [ ] **Send sponsor introduction email** to Sage with background on assigned sponsor
- [ ] **Update CRM** with sponsor assignment

### Commitment Tracking (T+2 days)

- [ ] **Document all commitments:**
  - Custom OpenShift vs. VMware Tanzu comparison document delivery
  - Follow-up technical workshop scheduling
  - Introduction to Kubernetes SIG contacts
  - Veterinary AI pilot proposal timeline
- [ ] **Send commitment summary to Sage**
- [ ] **Create follow-up tasks in CRM**

### Engagement Updates (T+7 days)

- [ ] **Establish engagement score baseline** in CRM
- [ ] **Establish relationship stage** (moving from Aware to Favorable)
- [ ] **Schedule next touchpoint** with Sage (within 2 weeks)
- [ ] **Consider CAB membership invitation** if platform decision goes our way

### NPS & Feedback (T+3 days)

- [ ] **Send NPS survey** to Sage
- [ ] **Target score:** 8/10 or higher (first briefing baseline)
- [ ] **Log feedback** and distribute to presenter team

### Pipeline Updates (T+7 days)

- [ ] **Update opportunity stages** in CRM:
  - Container Platform Standardization ($850K) -- update based on briefing outcome
  - Veterinary AI Platform ($320K) -- update based on briefing outcome
- [ ] **Schedule follow-up meetings** for active opportunities

## Protocol Reference: Standard VVIP Tier

| Element | Requirement | Status |
|---------|-------------|--------|
| Room | Standard meeting room (Pet-Friendly REQUIRED for this visit) | Required |
| Lobby Greeting | EBC Manager meets at lobby | Required |
| Catering | Standard vegan (substantive, not token) | Required |
| Sponsor Drop-in | Not applicable (no sponsor assigned yet) | N/A |
| CEO Drop-in | Not required for Standard tier | Not Scheduled |
| Gift | Standard tier, open-source themed | Required |
| Pet Accommodation | Dog bed, water bowl, pet-friendly room | Required |
| Welcome Display | Personalized, warm | Required |
| Thank-you Note | From EBC Manager | Required |
| Materials | Digital-first, minimal print | Required |

## Follow-up Priority: Sponsor Assignment

> **REMINDER:** WonderPaws has no assigned executive sponsor. This must be resolved within 48 hours post-briefing. The sponsor assignment is a gating item for the $850K platform decision opportunity.

**Criteria for sponsor assignment:**
1. Engineering background (not purely sales/account management)
2. Healthcare or life sciences vertical experience
3. Open-source community credibility
4. Available for regular touchpoints given account growth trajectory
5. Good personality fit with Sage (casual, technical, direct)

**Decision owner:** Healthcare Vertical Lead + Account Executive
**Decision deadline:** T+2 days post-briefing
